\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Wrapper around the stack levels -\/ keeps a pointer to the current top and bottom of the stack and a count of the current height. This allows the top to have non-\/null above pointer resulting from previously allocated stack levels that may be recycled later without {\ttfamily malloc} overhead. 

\label{doc-variable-members}
